user_message: I need you to process this escalation email from Coho Winery.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 11:06 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Coho Winery executive brief

There's been a change in our timeline for executive brief. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 16:35 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Coho Winery executive brief

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 12:54 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Coho Winery: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-H trap (Confuses role-change with departure); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-H failure mode (Confuses role-change with departure)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-H -- Confuses role-change with departure
